turns.query: Compare emission characteristics between different industry types in Handan City (city_id: 4) during June 2025. Analyze total emissions (SO2, NOx, PM, CO) from STEEL, POWER, CEMENT, CERAMICS, GLASS, and COKING enterprises, calculate emission intensity per industry type, and identify which industries contribute most to regional pollution.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月邯郸市六类重点行业企业排放对比结果如下：

| 行业 | 企业数 | 烟气量 m³ | SO₂ kg | NOx kg | PM kg | CO kg | 四项污染物合计 kg |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 钢铁 | 25 | 126,502,756,352 | 416,982.19 | 912,789.06 | 243,501.91 | 56,929,144.00 | 58,502,417.16 |
| 焦化 | 12 | 9,161,368,576 | 92,079.27 | 150,280.05 | 13,112.40 | 9,004,620.00 | 9,260,091.71 |
| 电力 | 7 | 7,756,412,416 | 82,130.38 | 160,173.11 | 13,184.50 | 0.00 | 255,487.99 |
| 水泥 | 4 | 2,216,680,448 | 5,729.16 | 55,433.07 | 5,733.84 | 0.00 | 66,896.06 |
| 陶瓷 | 1 | 43,309,132 | 1,108.59 | 4,032.20 | 343.40 | 0.00 | 5,484.19 |
| 玻璃 | 1 | 16,628,128 | 57.99 | 138.84 | 39.88 | 0.00 | 236.70 |

按烟气量看，最大贡献行业为：STEEL。

各行业烟气量占比显示，钢铁行业占86.83%，是邯郸市6月重点行业烟气排放的绝对主导来源；焦化占6.29%，电力占5.32%，水泥占1.52%，陶瓷和玻璃合计不足0.05%。

从污染物总量看，钢铁行业同样是主要贡献源：SO₂占69.72%，NOx占71.15%，PM占88.25%，CO占86.34%，四项污染物合计占85.92%。焦化行业四项污染物合计占13.60%，是第二大污染贡献行业，且CO排放量达到9,004,620 kg，对区域一氧化碳负荷贡献突出。电力和水泥行业主要贡献体现在NOx、SO₂和PM，但四项污染物合计占比分别仅为0.38%和0.10%。

单位烟气排放强度方面，陶瓷行业SO₂、NOx和PM强度最高，分别为0.255972、0.931027、0.079291 kg/万m³，说明其单位烟气污染物浓度负荷较高；焦化行业CO强度最高，为9.828903 kg/万m³，四项污染物综合强度也最高，为10.107760 kg/万m³。

综合判断：  
1. 钢铁行业是邯郸市2025年6月区域污染负荷的首要来源，应作为总量减排和过程管控的核心对象。  
2. 焦化行业虽然烟气量远低于钢铁，但CO排放强度和综合污染强度最高，应重点强化燃烧过程控制、无组织排放治理和在线监控核查。  
3. 陶瓷行业企业数量少、总量贡献低，但SO₂、NOx和PM单位烟气强度最高，需关注末端治理设施运行效率。  
4. 电力和水泥行业的NOx排放仍具有一定贡献，应继续加强脱硝设施稳定运行监管。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_date, end_date, city_id = "2025-06-01", "2025-07-01", 4
industries = ["STEEL", "POWER", "CEMENT", "CERAMICS", "GLASS", "COKING"]

count_query = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission e
JOIN polluting_company c ON e.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.city_id = :city_id
  AND e.date >= :start_date AND e.date < :end_date
  AND c.industry_type IN ('STEEL','POWER','CEMENT','CERAMICS','GLASS','COKING')
""")
record_count = pd.read_sql(count_query, engine, params={"city_id": city_id, "start_date": start_date, "end_date": end_date}).iloc[0,0]
print(f"纳入统计的企业日排放记录数：{record_count}")

agg_query = text("""
SELECT c.industry_type::text AS industry_type,
       COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS company_count,
       SUM(e.exhaust_gas)::float AS exhaust_gas,
       SUM(e.so2)::float AS so2,
       SUM(e.nox)::float AS nox,
       SUM(e.pm)::float AS pm,
       SUM(e.co)::float AS co
FROM daily_polluting_company_emission e
JOIN polluting_company c ON e.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.city_id = :city_id
  AND e.date >= :start_date AND e.date < :end_date
  AND c.industry_type IN ('STEEL','POWER','CEMENT','CERAMICS','GLASS','COKING')
GROUP BY c.industry_type
""")
df = pd.read_sql(agg_query, engine, params={"city_id": city_id, "start_date": start_date, "end_date": end_date})

full = pd.DataFrame({"industry_type": industries}).merge(df, on="industry_type", how="left")
num_cols = ["company_count", "exhaust_gas", "so2", "nox", "pm", "co"]
full[num_cols] = full[num_cols].fillna(0.0)
full["combined_pollutants"] = full[["so2","nox","pm","co"]].sum(axis=1)
for p in ["so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants"]:
    full[f"{p}_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3"] = (full[p] / full["exhaust_gas"].replace({0: pd.NA}) * 10000).astype("float")
full["exhaust_share_pct"] = (full["exhaust_gas"] / full["exhaust_gas"].sum() * 100).fillna(0)
full["combined_pollutant_share_pct"] = (full["combined_pollutants"] / full["combined_pollutants"].sum() * 100).fillna(0)

total_exhaust_steel = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="STEEL", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_power = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="POWER", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_cement = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="CEMENT", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_ceramics = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="CERAMICS", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_glass = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="GLASS", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_coking = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="COKING", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
top_contributing_industry = str(full.sort_values("exhaust_gas", ascending=False).iloc[0]["industry_type"]) if full["exhaust_gas"].sum() > 0 else ""

display_cols = ["industry_type","company_count","exhaust_gas","so2","nox","pm","co",
                "exhaust_share_pct","combined_pollutant_share_pct",
                "so2_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3","nox_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3",
                "pm_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3","co_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3",
                "combined_pollutants_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3"]
summary = full[display_cols].sort_values("combined_pollutants", ascending=False).round(6)
print("分行业汇总排放与强度（强度单位：kg/万m³烟气）：")
print(summary.to_string(index=False))
print(f"按烟气量判定的最大贡献行业：{top_contributing_industry}")
print("各污染物总量最高行业：")
for p in ["so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants"]:
    row = full.sort_values(p, ascending=False).iloc[0]
    print(f"{p.upper()}：{row['industry_type']}，{float(row[p]):.6f}")

# 修正汇总输出，并确保结果变量已按要求存储
full = full.copy()
full["combined_pollutants"] = full[["so2","nox","pm","co"]].sum(axis=1)
for p in ["so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants"]:
    full[f"{p}_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3"] = (full[p] / full["exhaust_gas"].replace({0: pd.NA}) * 10000).astype("float")
full["exhaust_share_pct"] = (full["exhaust_gas"] / full["exhaust_gas"].sum() * 100).fillna(0)
full["combined_pollutant_share_pct"] = (full["combined_pollutants"] / full["combined_pollutants"].sum() * 100).fillna(0)

total_exhaust_steel = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="STEEL", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_power = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="POWER", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_cement = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="CEMENT", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_ceramics = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="CERAMICS", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_glass = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="GLASS", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
total_exhaust_coking = float(full.loc[full.industry_type=="COKING", "exhaust_gas"].iloc[0])
top_contributing_industry = str(full.sort_values("exhaust_gas", ascending=False).iloc[0]["industry_type"]) if full["exhaust_gas"].sum() > 0 else ""

display_cols = ["industry_type","company_count","exhaust_gas","so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants",
                "exhaust_share_pct","combined_pollutant_share_pct",
                "so2_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3","nox_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3",
                "pm_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3","co_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3",
                "combined_pollutants_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3"]
summary = full[display_cols].sort_values("combined_pollutants", ascending=False).round(6)

print("分行业排放总量、贡献占比与排放强度：")
print(summary.to_string(index=False))

print("\n关键识别结果：")
print(f"烟气量最大贡献行业：{top_contributing_industry}")
print(f"钢铁烟气量：{total_exhaust_steel:.6f}")
print(f"电力烟气量：{total_exhaust_power:.6f}")
print(f"水泥烟气量：{total_exhaust_cement:.6f}")
print(f"陶瓷烟气量：{total_exhaust_ceramics:.6f}")
print(f"玻璃烟气量：{total_exhaust_glass:.6f}")
print(f"焦化烟气量：{total_exhaust_coking:.6f}")

print("\n各污染物总量最高行业：")
for p in ["so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants"]:
    row = full.sort_values(p, ascending=False).iloc[0]
    print(f"{p.upper()}：{row['industry_type']}，排放量 {float(row[p]):.6f}，行业占比 {(float(row[p]) / float(full[p].sum()) * 100 if full[p].sum() else 0):.6f}%")

print("\n各污染物单位烟气排放强度最高行业：")
for p in ["so2","nox","pm","co","combined_pollutants"]:
    col = f"{p}_intensity_kg_per_10k_m3"
    row = full.sort_values(col, ascending=False, na_position="last").iloc[0]
    print(f"{p.upper()}强度：{row['industry_type']}，{float(row[col]):.6f} kg/万m³")
